documents.text: Machine learning requires large datasets for training models effectively
Deep neural networks learn hierarchical representations from raw data
Transformers use attention mechanisms for natural language processing tasks
Embeddings map text to high-dimensional vectors for semantic representation
Retrieval Augmented Generation improves large language model outputs
LangChain orchestrates AI agents and tool use for complex workflows
Prompt engineering guides language model behavior and response quality
Fine-tuning adapts pre-trained models to specific domains and tasks
Vector similarity measures semantic relatedness between text documents
RAG systems combine retrieval and generation for knowledge-grounded responses
PostgreSQL is a powerful open-source relational database system
MongoDB stores flexible JSON-like documents with dynamic schemas
Pinecone provides serverless vector database infrastructure at scale
ChromaDB makes vector search simple and portable for developers
HNSW indexing enables fast approximate nearest neighbor search queries
Vector databases scale similarity search to billions of documents
pgvector extends PostgreSQL with vector operations and similarity search
B-tree indexes optimize SQL query performance for structured data
Database replication ensures high availability and disaster recovery
Query optimization reduces database load and improves application performance
Python dominates data science and artificial intelligence development
FastAPI simplifies building REST APIs with automatic documentation
Docker containerizes applications for consistent deployment across environments
Kubernetes orchestrates containerized workloads at enterprise scale
Git version control enables team collaboration on software projects
CI/CD pipelines automate testing and deployment for rapid iteration
Microservices architecture decouples system components for scalability
API design patterns ensure consistency and usability across endpoints
Unit testing improves code reliability and maintainability over time
Performance optimization reduces latency and operational costs
